auth.toggleToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty: Nothing in the ledger yet. Add your first project to get started.
projects.detailPlaceholder: Analysis and campaigns will live here.

form.title: New project
form.name: Project name
form.urlError: Add a project name and a valid website (e.g. masaarat.ai).

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This will permanently remove all analyses, campaigns, and content linked to it — there is no undo.
delete.failed: Could not delete the project. Please try again.

step1.title: Analyze website
step1.subtitle: One-time foundation — we read your site and extract your business intelligence. You can re-run this anytime.
step1.oneTimeNote: This step analyzes your website, not a campaign. Campaign ideas come later.
step1.connectedSitesPreamble: If your site has pages behind login, connect them here before analysis for a sharper result. Otherwise, run analysis on public content as usual.

connectedSitesPanel.title: Connect a login-protected site (optional)
connectedSitesPanel.hint: Connect the site, sign in in the browser window, then run analysis — or skip and scan public pages only.

step1.completeSummary: Website analysis is complete. Review and edit your brand profile in the next step.

step2.title: Brand profile
step2.subtitle: Review and refine what we learned about your brand.

step3.title: Available channels
step3.subtitle: Choose the platforms where you actually publish.

step4.title: Campaigns
step4.subtitle: Start a new campaign anytime — pick a ready-made package or describe your goal to the AI strategist.
step4.repeatableNote: This step is not one-time. Create as many campaigns as you need; each one gets its own plan and content.

locked.needsAnalysis: Run website analysis first to unlock this step.
locked.needsBrand: Complete website analysis first to unlock this step.
locked.needsChannels: Select and save at least one channel first.

analysis.title: Website intelligence
analysis.idleBody: This site hasn't been analyzed yet. Run analysis so AI can read your pages and extract marketing-ready intelligence: audience, tone, messages, angles, and content opportunities.
analysis.runningHint: This can take a minute. Keep this tab open.

errors.staleRun: This analysis timed out and was stopped. Try again.
errors.fetchTimeout: We couldn't reach your site within 30 seconds. Check that the URL works.
errors.aiTimeout: The AI analysis step timed out. Try again.
errors.jsRenderedSite: Very little readable text was found — the site may need JavaScript. If it requires login, connect it under Connected Sites.
errors.thinContent: Not enough readable content to analyze. Make sure your pages include sufficient text.
errors.fetchHttp: Couldn't open the site (HTTP {status}). Check that the URL works.
errors.authSessionExpired: Your session expired — reconnect the site.
errors.noProtectedPages: We couldn't read any protected pages. The site may need extra rendering.
errors.watchdogTimeout: This analysis took too long and was stopped. Try again.

report.campaignExportFailed: Could not export the campaign report.

connectedSites.title: Connected sites
connectedSites.emptyHint: If your site requires login, connect it here so we can read your protected pages. We never see or store your password — only the session.

errors.sessionStartFailed: Could not start the connect session. Please try again.
errors.browserbaseNotConfigured: Secure browser access is not configured on the server. Check the Browserbase keys, then restart the preview.
errors.sessionEncryptionNotConfigured: Session encryption is not configured on the server. Check SESSION_ENCRYPTION_KEY, then restart the preview.
errors.browserbaseCapacity: Too many browser sessions are running. Wait a minute and try again.
errors.sessionSaveFailed: Could not save your session after sign-in. Please try again.

modal.title: Link site
modal.subtitle: Sign in to your site
modal.instructions: This window is a real browser on your site. Type your email and password there as you normally would. We never see or store your password — we only save the session so we can read your protected pages. When you're logged in, click "I'm signed in".
modal.passwordNote: Your password goes directly to your site — it never passes through us.
modal.loginNavigationFailed: Couldn't open the login page automatically. Enter the URL manually in the browser window.

channelSettings.title: Available channels
channelSettings.description: Enable only the platforms where you have an active account. Future campaigns will be built around this list.
channelSettings.pickOne: Select at least one channel before starting a campaign.

generate.endBeforeStart: End date must be after start date.

packages.enableChannelsFirst: Enable your available channels above first so we can tailor packages to your platforms.

limited_offer.name: Limited-time offer / discount
limited_offer.description: Short purchase-push campaign for customers who already know the brand and are close to buying.

product_launch.name: New product / service launch
product_launch.description: Introduce a new need to the market and build a clear story from awareness through decision.

brand_awareness.name: Brand awareness
brand_awareness.description: Build mental availability and distinctive assets your audience remembers quickly.

lead_gen.name: Lead generation
lead_gen.description: Draw attention to a specific problem and get interested prospects to share their details.

value_authority.name: Value content / authority building
value_authority.description: Educational content that positions the brand as the guide in its field and builds long-term trust.

quick_post.name: Quick single post
quick_post.description: One post with a specific goal. The marketing framework is chosen at generation time based on the objective.

adaptation.droppedIdeal: This package is designed for {ideal}. We adapted it to {chosen} because the other channels aren't available.
adaptation.noIdeal: None of the package's ideal channels ({ideal}) are available, so we used {chosen}.
adaptation.reducedPosts: We reduced the total post count to {total} to keep a balanced split across your available channels (instead of {original}).

strategist.title: Strategist
strategist.greeting: Hi! I'm your strategist. Tell me about the campaign you want — the goal, the offer, or a general idea — and I'll help you build a plan tailored to your brand.
strategist.enableChannelsFirst: Enable your available channels above first.

campaignPage.manualPublishHint: We copied the text for you — paste and publish.

postPreview.imagePlaceholder: Image slot — no image selected yet
postPreview.saveItemFirst: Save this item before generating an image

postPreviewGallery.title: Post previews — how they'll look when published
postPreviewGallery.subtitle: Sample layouts for each platform, with image controls (generate / upload / paste URL).

tracker.title: Project Tracker
tracker.subtitle: Live view of PROJECT_TRACKER.md from the repo
